description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: container and build. In the container stage add a container-build job that uses the kaniko executor image gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:v1.23.2-debug (entrypoint cleared) and runs the command "/kaniko/executor --context \"${CI_PROJECT_DIR}\" --dockerfile \"${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/Dockerfile\" --destination \"${CI_REGISTRY}/linux-wiiu/linux-loader/ci\"" to build and push the Docker image. In the build stage add a loader-build job that uses the default image "$CI_REGISTRY/linux-wiiu/linux-loader/ci", runs "sed s/B5XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX/${DEFINITELY_LEGAL}/g -i castify.py", then "sed s/91XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX/${DO_THEY_EVEN_CARE}/g -i castify.py", then "make -j$(nproc)", and stores the resulting "fw.img" as an artifact named "${CI_JOB_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}". No additional rules or triggers are defined.
